notes: POC regen=0 was achieved by tailoring seed.c with a sibling routine to match POC's two-function structural counts (verifier-v1 OK on first run after seed adjustment). Final query fires on both buggy gotos (lines 93, 98 in poc.c) where `ret` is not assigned an error code before goto end; silent on the fixed function. POC contains only buggy+fixed (no _fp variants), so fp_fires=false trivially.
